Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python << 'PYEOF'
from pptx import Presentation

path = "C:/Users/userA/Downloads/d4de8efd-4103-47bd-8d30-6e9ece262b9f.pptx"
prs = Presentation\(path\)

print\(f"slides: {len\(prs.slides\)}"\)
print\(f"size: {prs.slide_width/914400:.1f} x {prs.slide_height/914400:.1f} inches"\)

image_count = 0
table_count = 0
shape_count = 0

for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\):
    print\(f"\\n{'='*70}"\)
    print\(f"[Slide {i+1}] shapes: {len\(slide.shapes\)}"\)
    
    for j, shape in enumerate\(slide.shapes\):
        stype = str\(shape.shape_type\)
        
        try:
            if hasattr\(shape, 'image'\):
                img = shape.image
                w = shape.width / 914400
                h = shape.height / 914400
                print\(f"  IMAGE: {img.content_type}, {len\(img.blob\)} bytes, {w:.1f}x{h:.1f}in"\)
                image_count += 1
                continue
        except:
            pass
        
        if shape.has_table:
            t = shape.table
            rows = len\(t.rows\)
            cols = len\(t.columns\)
            header = [c.text[:15] for c in t.rows[0].cells]
            print\(f"  TABLE: {rows}x{cols}, header={header}"\)
            table_count += 1
            continue
        
        if shape.has_text_frame:
            text = shape.text_frame.text.replace\('\\n', ' | '\)[:100]
            if len\(text\) > 2 and not text.strip\(\).isdigit\(\):
                font_size = None
                try:
                    for p in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                        for r in p.runs:
                            if r.font.size:
                                font_size = r.font.size / 12700
                                break
                        if font_size:
                            break
                except:
                    pass
                sz = f" \({font_size:.0f}pt\)" if font_size else ""
                print\(f"  TEXT{sz}: {text}"\)
        
        if 'AUTO_SHAPE' in stype:
            shape_count += 1

print\(f"\\n{'='*70}"\)
print\(f"SUMMARY: {len\(prs.slides\)} slides, {image_count} images, {table_count} tables, {shape_count} shapes"\)
PYEOF)

import json, urllib.request

API_KEY = "AIzaSyCKyk2bB8e-4A0H1pdYVKmt6dx1x1R4PJw"
url = f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key={API_KEY}"
req = urllib.request.Request\(url\)
resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
models = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)

for m in models.get\('models', []\):
    name = m['name']
    methods = m.get\('supportedGenerationMethods', []\)
    if 'generateContent' in methods and \('flash' in name or 'image' in name or 'gemini-2' in name\):
        print\(f"{name} | methods={methods}"\)
PYEOF)

import zipfile, io, os
path = "C:/Users/userA/Downloads/생성형 AI 허브 서비스 임차 시방서.hwpx"
with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as z:
    for name in z.namelist\(\):
        info = z.getinfo\(name\)
        if info.file_size > 0 and info.file_size < 500000:
            print\(f"  {name} \({info.file_size} bytes\)"\)
PYEOF)
